existing_findings.comment: Consider rate-limiting failed logins to prevent brute force.

comments.author: agent
comments.text: Good point. I'll add a simple in-memory rate limiter in the next commit.

existing_findings.comment: New /login endpoint does not validate request body before passing token to auth layer.
Is oldHelper used anywhere else? If not, deletion is fine.

commits.message: feat: add audit logging to login flow
